title: T-035 — Approve All modal (approve_all_modal)
prompt:
# T-035 — Approve All modal

PRD: docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-07-01 Zone D, §16.2 OQ-EXT-06
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:289-320 (`approve_all_modal`)
UX: prototypes/design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:336
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Dialog confirmation for [Approve All] bulk action covering all completed runs (per OQ-EXT-06) — shows assignment count grouped by run, calls bulk_approve API.

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/scheduler/ApproveAllModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog).
2. Loads pending count grouped by run_id via server query before opening.
3. Confirm → calls /api/scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve (T-017); shows loading state; on success → toast 'X assignments approved'.
4. Scheduling Officer scope warning: 'You will only approve assignments in your scope (N of M)'.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/ApproveAllModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/ApproveAllModal.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Planner Advanced + 5 pending across 2 runs, when modal opens, then table shows 2 rows (Run A: 3, Run B: 2) and total=5
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:289-320, then it has same Dialog layout, same run-group table, same [Approve All]/[Cancel] buttons, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Table, Badge, Button) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given Scheduling Officer with scope=2 of 5 pending, when modal opens, then warning Alert variant='warning' shows 'You will only approve assignments in your scope (2 of 5)'

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/ApproveAllModal.test.tsx covering count grouping + parity + officer-scope warning
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/ApproveAllModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not approve outside Scheduling Officer scope
- Do not call API without confirmation
- Do not group by run on client (server query returns pre-grouped)

pipeline_inputs.description: Confirmation Dialog for bulk approve across all runs with run-group table + officer-scope warning.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-grouped count query feeds table. shadcn Dialog. Confirm calls T-017 bulk_approve endpoint. Officer-scope warning rendered conditionally.
out_of_scope: Do not implement bulk_approve API here (T-017)
Do not implement individual approve modal (uses inline button)
